title: Foreigners
description: Foreigners is a modpack made for the Foreigners Story, now available to everyone to create their own stories.
body:
Foreigners is a Fabric 1.20.4 modpack made for the Foreigners Story server, now uploaded to modrinth for everyone to access! You will be able to explore, trade, fight and create your own stories with this modpack.

You've got many biomes and structures to explore, thanks to Terrestria and the different structured mods, like Dungeons and Taverns, and YUNG's Better Dungeons.

Apart from the different structure variety, we also offer you two dimensions: The Bumblezone, and Heaven (yes, heaven itself); and a totally restructured Nether and End, thanks to Incendium and Nullscape!

NOTE: Please enable either EMI (+addons) OR REI, not both!! Not all mods are supposed to be enabled at the same time. <3

Mods in this modpack:
- [Shulker Box Tooltip](https://modrinth.com/mod/2M01OLQq) by MisterPeModder (Optional)
- [Terrestria](https://modrinth.com/mod/lsUDPMOT) by coderbot16, NeusFear, TerraformersMC
- [Mouse Tweaks](https://modrinth.com/mod/aC3cM3Vq) by Ivan Molodetskikh (YaLTeR) (Optional)
